diagrams.title: Key-Value Store Data Model
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental structure of key-value pairs in a database
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates that keys are unique identifiers and values can be any data type

diagrams.title: CAP Theorem Triangle
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing only two of three properties can be guaranteed
elements: Key-Value stores typically choose AP path

diagrams.title: Consistent Hashing Ring
diagrams.description: Hash ring showing data distribution across nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how consistent hashing minimizes data movement during scaling

diagrams.title: Horizontal Scaling with Sharding
diagrams.description: Shows data partitioned across multiple server nodes
elements: Each shard contains subset of key-ranges
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how data is distributed and accessed in distributed Key-Value stores
